GTA Online Event Week: New Update Preparation (July 9th-13th)

Upcoming Gameplay Changes Teased

Rockstar say in their newswire that they are “constantly working” on the game.

Rewards

Log in to GTA Online this week to receive the Lady Liberty Bucket Hat. Plus, there is a 100% chance of a reward.

Fine Art Collector Program

  • Log in to receive GTA$500,000 within 72 hours, plus a free Benefactor Turreted Limo from Warstock Cache & Carry
  • Complete any Heist to receive GTA$1,000,000 within 72 hours, plus the NOOSE Outfit

Salvage Yard Robberies

  • The Gangbanger Robbery: Grotti Turismo Omaggio

Podium Vehicle

This week at the Casino in GTA Online, take your daily spin with the lucky wheel for your chance to win the Ocelot Jugular.

Gun Van Contents

  • Heavy Rifle (40%, GTA+ 40%)
  • Firework Launcher (FREE)

Premium Race

This week’s Premium Race is Muscle In .

Time Trial

This week's Time Trial is El Burro Heights .

Weekly Challenge

The GTA Online Weekly Challenge for this week is “Complete three Bunker Research Missions”.

Discounts

FREE
  • Lago Zancudo Bunker
  • High-End Garages
70% off
  • Mobile Operations Center
  • Benefactor Terrorbyte
50% off
  • Pegassi Toreador

Bonuses

  • 3x GTA$ & RP on Stunt Race Series
  • 2x GTA$ & RP on Bunker Sell Missions

GTA+ Benefits

  • RockstarINTEL Bluesky
  • Grand Theft Auto News X
